manifest_title: HUF-GOV CoDa Plugin Manifest v1.0 — Open-Loop Ratio State Monitoring Extension
origin: Grok temporal coherence review, filed by Claude
purpose: HUF-GOV as a non-intrusive plugin/extension layer for any existing CoDa toolchain. Mirrors original TensorAcousticForge → Smaart v9 API intent: keep developments close, coherent, and mutually reinforcing while each evolves independently using mature tools.

plugin_architecture.role: HUF-GOV acts as a CoDa plugin: inputs = renormalised simplex carrier (any CoDa tool output); outputs = polarity-aligned roots + Keff_fill scalar + persistence metrics. No modification of host tool internals.
integration_points: CoDaPack: post-process ilr balances → feed locked SBP → return a0–a3 + Keff_fill
R 'compositions': extend with custom functions huf_roots() and huf_keff_fill()
R 'robCompositions'/'zCompositions': zero-handling hook for E-03 tension
Python pyCoDa / scikit-bio: import huf_gov as plugin; plugin.compute_roots(carrier)
HUF-internal CoDa Explorer (HUF_Spectrum_Analyzer_v3.html): live dashboard visualisation

interface_contracts.output: four polarity-aligned roots a0–a3 + Keff_fill scalar + full persistence suite (group delay, ETC τ, RT60≈3τ, spectrograms)

core_steps: 2. Locked SBP filter-bank → ilr balances b_k = √(r_k s_k / (r_k + s_k)) ln(g(+k)/g(−k))
3. Aitchison geometry operations (CLR deviations, d_A distances)
4. Polarity-aligned roots: a0(internal-balance), a1(fleet-alignment), a2(concentration-resistance), a3(shape)
persistence_suite: ETC τ (persistence duration via Hilbert envelope + exponential fit)
locked_pipeline.slow_fast_split: Slow carriers (5–9+ yr / long τ / RT60) vs fast carriers (1–5 yr / short τ / RT60) — domain-invariant

polarity_aligned_roots.a0_internal_balance: Measures intra-carrier equilibrium — how evenly mass is distributed. Positive when shares balanced, negative when one carrier dominates.
polarity_aligned_roots.a1_fleet_alignment: Measures how closely local carrier mix matches global reference fleet. Computed as complement of Aitchison distance to reference. Positive when aligned, negative when deviating.
polarity_aligned_roots.a2_concentration_resistance: Measures resistance to mass concentration (inverse Herfindahl). Positive when dispersed, negative when concentrated.
polarity_aligned_roots.a3_shape: Measures higher-moment distribution shape (skew/kurtosis). Modulated by SBP bandwidths, group-delay spreads, ETC persistence, spectrogram ridge durations. Positive when stable, negative when distorted under impulse.

already_computed: Group delay per carrier (COVID + Energy Crisis shocks)
ETC τ per carrier and SBP balance (COVID + Energy Crisis)
identified_not_yet_computed: Winding-transformer decimation ladder (daily → monthly → quarterly → annual)

conserved_quantity_hypothesis.alternative: Total information content (entropy of compositional time series)
conserved_quantity_hypothesis.status: UNTESTED — requires decimation comparison to verify
conserved_quantity_hypothesis.test: Compute Aitchison variance on daily data, decimate via geometric-mean to monthly/annual, compare. If values match within tolerance, conservation confirmed.

four_kicked_tires: Tire 1: EMBER annual 9-carrier energy shares (baseline — spectral independence confirmed)
Tire 2: Financial portfolio daily sector weights
Tire 3: European daily electricity price shares (tweeter test — spectral independence failed, persistence holds)
six_spare_tires: Spare 1: Backblaze daily SMART data (drive model proportions)
Spare 2: Public acoustic loudspeaker impulse responses
Spare 3: Public daily financial index sector weights (S&P 500 sectors)
Spare 4: Public Ramsar wetland vegetation/hydrology time series
Spare 5: Public daily European electricity generation shares (ENTSO-E/OPSD)
Spare 6: Public climate policy outcome shares (IEA/OWID renewable adoption fractions)
test_cases.success_criterion: All tires must show identical slow/fast persistence split (5–9+ yr / long τ for slow carriers vs 1–5 yr / short τ for fast carriers), coherent Keff_fill modulation, and consistent two-phase CR behaviour. Any tire failing requires documented carrier-set sensitivity note.

governance.open_loop_doctrine: HUF-GOV remains strictly observational; no closed-loop elements released
pll_rules: Rule 5: no new constants (6.02 dB budget, 115 Hz·m, 5.5-octave BW locked from BTL)
claude_flags: Plugin manifest is design vision, not implementation
Most temporal tools identified but not computed on actual data
